reminder.title: Student loan payment alert
reminder.message: Loan payment of $380.00 is due on the 15th. Auto-pay is set through Great Lakes on the Chase account ending 4821. Confirm balance is above $400 before the draft date.
reminder.account_reference: Great Lakes federal loan, account GL-4471829

reminder.title: Every-other-Sunday call with Dad
reminder.message: Call Roland on the even-numbered Sundays. Keep it under 45 minutes - he talks through the whole afternoon if you let him.

reminder.title: Confirm dinner spot with Naomi
reminder.message: Text Naomi to confirm or choose the Wednesday dinner spot by 5 PM. Alternate who picks the place. Usual time is around 7:30 PM.

reminder.title: Speed workout gear check
reminder.message: Gear check before the 6:00 AM track session: charged Garmin Forerunner 255, Brooks speed shoes, water bottle, gels. Lakefront track.

reminder.title: Tempo run wake-up
reminder.message: Tempo run starts at 6:15 AM. Target 7 miles at 7:35 to 7:40 per mile pace. Check the lakefront wind forecast before heading out.

reminder.title: Week-end court calendar review
reminder.message: Review next week's court calendar with Marcus. Flag any prep gaps and block time over the weekend if a filing is due before Wednesday.

reminder.title: Pacers long run
reminder.message: Leave by 6:45 AM to reach Montrose Harbor for the 7:00 AM Pacers group run. Confirm the route with Derek in the Pacers Discord the night before.

reminder.title: Meal prep and grocery check
reminder.message: After the easy recovery run. Overnight oats, salad batch, and protein for the week. Check the fridge first. Instacart or Mariano's walk depending on weather.

reminder.title: Monthly Ally savings transfer review
reminder.message: Confirm the $852.00 auto-transfer to Ally high-yield savings posted from Chase. Target savings balance is $20,000 by January 2027. Current APY 4.20 percent.

reminder.title: Roland Roth birthday
reminder.message: Dad's birthday. He will say not to make a fuss. Make a fuss anyway. Call in the morning before court.

reminder.title: Denise Roth birthday
reminder.message: Mom's birthday. Send a card at minimum. She will mention that you never call enough. She is right.

reminder.title: Aunt Vivian Clark birthday
reminder.message: Aunt Vivian's birthday. She sends birthday money every year, so a call is the bare minimum. WhatsApp works for her.

reminder.title: Naomi Roth birthday
reminder.message: Naomi's birthday. Dinner at Avec, reservation for two at 7:30 PM already set. Garmin Forerunner 265 already ordered as the main gift.

reminder.title: Annual physical - schedule before August
reminder.message: Schedule annual physical with Dr. Maya Okonkwo at Wicker Park Health Associates before August. Request iron panel recheck alongside the standard panel.
reminder.provider: Maya Okonkwo MD - Wicker Park Health Associates

reminder.title: Renter's insurance renewal notice
reminder.message: Lemonade policy LMN-IL-7741209 renews November 1 each year. Review coverage amounts and confirm Damen Property Management LLC is still listed as interested party.

reminder.title: Felony trial one begins
reminder.message: Trial prep must be complete by October 3. Block the weekend of October 3 to 4 for final prep. No travel, no long social commitments.

reminder.title: Felony trial two begins
reminder.message: Second complex felony trial. Back-to-back with trial one - plan the recovery week accordingly.

reminder.title: Lakefront Pacers final tune-up long run
reminder.message: 12 miles at half-marathon pace with the Pacers. Montrose Harbor start. Key race rehearsal - treat it like a dress rehearsal for November 1.

reminder.title: Lakefront Half-Marathon packet pickup
reminder.message: Packet pickup at Grant Park expo. Bring photo ID. Confirm bib 4417 is in corral B. Pick up the race shirt if available early.

reminder.title: Lakefront Half-Marathon race day
reminder.message: Wake by 5:30 AM. Leave for Grant Park by 6:30 AM. Start line 7:30 AM. Goal time 1:42:00. Everything leads to this.

reminder.title: Naomi birthday dinner - Avec reservation
reminder.message: Avec, reservation for two at 7:30 PM. Give the Garmin Forerunner 265 at dinner. Her birthday, your treat.

reminder.title: Student loan November payment
reminder.message: Loan payment of $380.00 due November 15. Auto-pay set. Confirm Chase checking balance covers it.
